## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and plan the redesign of Surge AI's blog, focusing on the upcoming benchmark blog post.](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=8.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Priority: Release benchmark blog post next week; focus on visual components, not interactive elements](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=104.0)
  - [Blog redesign: Aim for minimalist approach, balancing content readability with necessary visual elements](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Brand considerations: Temporary use of current design elements; await results of upcoming brand sprint](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Workflow: Jean to create initial designs in Figma, share for feedback, then implement in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)

## Topics

### Blog Post Components and Design

  - [Current blog lacks interactive elements and some visual components](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [V1 focus: entirely visual, no interactive elements (except possibly hoverable citations)](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=252.0)
  - [Key components needed:](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=170.0)
      - [Prompt-response displays](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [Tables](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [Conversation/back-and-forth representations](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
      - [Citations (possibly hoverable)](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=280.0)
  - [Aim for balance: text-focused when appropriate, with visual elements where necessary](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Reference: New York Times interactive articles as aspirational goal](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)

### Technical Considerations

  - [Webflow to be used for V1 implementation](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
      - [Jean confident in Webflow's flexibility for complex designs](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=477.0)
  - [Future considerations: potential move away from Webflow for more advanced features](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=463.0)

### Branding and Visual Identity

  - [Ongoing brand development with Edwin (3 months of iterations)](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=545.0)
  - [Temporary approach: Use current minimal design language](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=577.0)
  - [Blog post thumbnails: Use existing style for now, revisit after brand sprint](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)
  - [Author section: Find balance between minimal (name only) and too much detail](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=866.0)

### Workflow and Timeline

  - [Jean to design in Figma first, using actual content](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [Initial designs to be shared in shared channel by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Iterative process: Go wide with options, select, refine, then implement](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Target: Blog post live next week](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Additional Features

  - [Categories for blog posts: Not for V1, but consider for future](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=322.0)
  - ["Dive deeper" section: Potential appendix view for raw examples, lower priority](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=798.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Jean to create initial designs in Figma by Monday](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=957.0)
  - [Team to review and provide feedback on designs in shared channel](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Iterate on designs based on feedback](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=901.0)
  - [Implement approved design in Webflow](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=777.0)
  - [Aim for blog post to go live next week](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [GrowthX team to facilitate final approval from Surge AI team](https://fathom.video/share/s-y7G9pA3pnqySzPzMJyNrWo1aJQi8rW?tab=summary&timestamp=666.0)
